# devhelm_monitor (Data Source)

Look up a DevHelm monitor by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Reference an existing monitor by name (e.g. one created by another team in
# a different repo) so you can attach it to a status page or notification
# policy without owning its lifecycle.
data "devhelm_monitor" "shared_api" {
  name = "Public API"
}

resource "devhelm_status_page_component" "api" {
  status_page_id = devhelm_status_page.public.id
  name           = "Public API"
  type           = "MONITOR"
  monitor_id     = data.devhelm_monitor.shared_api.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Monitor name to look up

### Read-Only

- `config` (String) Monitor configuration as JSON
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the monitor is active
- `frequency_seconds` (Number) Check frequency in seconds
- `id` (String) Unique identifier
- `ping_url` (String) Heartbeat ping URL
- `type` (String) Monitor type
